configuration-properties.doc:name: Config Properties
configuration-properties.doc:description: Loads application properties including HTTP port and downstream Process API host/port

http:listener-config.name: HTTP_Listener_config
http:listener-config.doc:name: HTTP Listener Config
http:listener-config.doc:description: HTTP listener configuration for customers-exp-api on port ${http.port}

http:request-config.name: PRC_API_Request_config
http:request-config.doc:name: Process API Request Config
http:request-config.doc:description: HTTP request configuration for calling the customers-orders-prc-api Process API on port 8082
